# PROFILE

Medical Informatics specialist and Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience in designing, building, and scaling clinical data systems and digital platforms.

Bridges academic expertise in biomedical engineering and medical informatics with hands-on development of real-world healthcare solutions, including clinical registries and clinic information systems.

Focused on leveraging structured healthcare data, patient registries, and AI-assisted tools to improve clinical workflows, research quality, and patient outcomes.

---

# RESEARCH INTERESTS

- Real-world healthcare data and patient registries
- Clinical data modeling and longitudinal data systems
- Digital health platforms and patient-centered applications
- Electronic Health Records (EHR) and interoperability
- AI-assisted clinical workflows and decision support
- Chronic disease monitoring systems
